steps: Feature engineering (cardiovascular risk score, glucose/BMI categories, senior flag)
pipeline.resampling_method: SMOTE (ratio=0.35) for RF only; class weights for LR/XGB

presets.label: High-risk senior
presets.description: Older male with hypertension, heart disease, elevated glucose and BMI.

presets.label: Moderate middle-aged
presets.description: Middle-aged female with hypertension and borderline glucose.

presets.label: Low-risk younger adult
presets.description: Younger adult without comorbidities and normal vitals.

presets.label: Hold-out test sample
presets.description: First row from the stratified test split (seed 42).
